title: ReferenceResolutionAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by the chain reference-resolution-substrate T8 retrospective to record that the reference-resolution layer (detector + resolver registry + resolve_references action + telemetry integration + hook supersession + harness-reminder interception) has been verified against the chain's completion criteria. Third audit-event in the substrate trilogy (after ArchitectureAuditCompleted from agent-first-substrate and TelemetryAuditCompleted from query-telemetry-substrate); the closing audit lands through the write-side events ledger as the self-hosting proof of the cross-substrate seam. Findings are keyed to docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION.md sections and the chain's eight completion-condition items.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the audit source-doc the findings were keyed against — typically docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION.md (T1 design + per-task implementation notes) + the retrospective doc at docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION_RETROSPECTIVE_<date>.md.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome — what landed, what was deferred, which downstream chains become buildable.

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the next phase of work (e.g. 'Pick up ml-capability-substrate chain T1-T4'). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per audit checklist item. Severity uses the audit-convention enum (low / medium / high / critical); use n/a for informational findings.

item.description: Audit checklist item identifier and short description.

status.description: pass = criterion satisfied; fail = criterion not satisfied (must file follow-on); partial = satisfied with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope for this chain.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting status — SQL query result, test name, commit SHA, doc pointer, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
